title: Tears on Your Face

first_paragraph: ***Tears on Your Face*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): ***Una lacrima sul viso***) is a 1964 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") *[musicarello](/wiki/Musicarello "Musicarello")* film directed by [Ettore Maria Fizzarotti](/wiki/Ettore_Maria_Fizzarotti "Ettore Maria Fizzarotti"). Its Italian title is taken from the hit [song of the same name](/wiki/Una_lacrima_sul_viso "Una lacrima sul viso") by the film's star [Bobby Solo](/wiki/Bobby_Solo "Bobby Solo").[[1]](#cite_note-60-69_m-z-1)[[2]](#cite_note-stracult-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1964 Italian film

| Tears on Your Face | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Ettore Maria Fizzarotti](/wiki/Ettore_Maria_Fizzarotti "Ettore Maria Fizzarotti") |
| Written by | [Giovanni Grimaldi](/wiki/Giovanni_Grimaldi "Giovanni Grimaldi")  [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Starring | [Bobby Solo](/wiki/Bobby_Solo "Bobby Solo") |
| Cinematography | [Stelvio Massi](/wiki/Stelvio_Massi "Stelvio Massi") |
| Edited by | [Franco Fraticelli](/wiki/Franco_Fraticelli "Franco Fraticelli") |
| Music by | [Gianni Marchetti](/wiki/Gianni_Marchetti "Gianni Marchetti") |
| Release date | * 1964 (1964) |
| Country | Italy |
| Language | [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") |

***Tears on Your Face*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): ***Una lacrima sul viso***) is a 1964 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") *[musicarello](/wiki/Musicarello "Musicarello")* film directed by [Ettore Maria Fizzarotti](/wiki/Ettore_Maria_Fizzarotti "Ettore Maria Fizzarotti"). Its Italian title is taken from the hit [song of the same name](/wiki/Una_lacrima_sul_viso "Una lacrima sul viso") by the film's star [Bobby Solo](/wiki/Bobby_Solo "Bobby Solo").[[1]](#cite_note-60-69_m-z-1)[[2]](#cite_note-stracult-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tears_on_Your_Face&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Bobby Solo](/wiki/Bobby_Solo "Bobby Solo"): Bobby Tonner
* [Laura Efrikian](/wiki/Laura_Efrikian "Laura Efrikian"): Lucia
* [Nino Taranto](/wiki/Nino_Taranto "Nino Taranto"): Professor Giovanni Todini
* [Lucy D'Albert](/w/index.php?title=Lucy_D%27Albert&action=edit&redlink=1 "Lucy D'Albert (page does not exist)"): Luisa Todini
* [Dolores Palumbo](/wiki/Dolores_Palumbo "Dolores Palumbo"): Teresa
* [Lena von Martens](/w/index.php?title=Lena_von_Martens&action=edit&redlink=1 "Lena von Martens (page does not exist)"): Gabriella
* [Dante Maggio](/wiki/Dante_Maggio "Dante Maggio"): Traffic policeman
* [Agostino Salvietti](/wiki/Agostino_Salvietti "Agostino Salvietti"): Vincenzo
* [Carlo Taranto](/wiki/Carlo_Taranto "Carlo Taranto"): Guitarist
